name: Aptamil Stage 1 Infant Formula 900g
name_ar: حليب أبتاميل المرحلة الأولى للرضع 900 جرام
ingredients: lactose, vegetable oils, skimmed milk, prebiotics (GOS/FOS), DHA, ARA, vitamins, minerals
safety_notes: Not suitable for infants with cow's milk allergy. Consult pediatrician before use. Halal certified.

name: Pampers Premium Care Diapers Size 3
name_ar: حفاضات بامبرز بريميوم كير مقاس 3
ingredients: absorbent core, breathable cotton-like cover, hypoallergenic
safety_notes: Dermatologically tested. No parabens, no fragrance, no latex.

name: Cetaphil Baby Gentle Wash & Shampoo 230ml
name_ar: غسول وشامبو سيتافيل بيبي اللطيف 230 مل
ingredients: purified water, glycerin, panthenol, almond oil, calendula extract
safety_notes: Tear-free, soap-free, paraben-free. Suitable for newborn skin. Contains tree nut (almond) - avoid if allergic.

name: Chicco Next2Me Bedside Crib
name_ar: سرير شيكو نكست تو مي بجانب السرير
ingredients: steel frame, breathable mesh sides, washable cotton mattress cover
safety_notes: Conforms to EN 1130 safety standard. Always use on flat surface. Stop using when baby can sit unaided.

name: Maxi-Cosi Pebble 360 Car Seat
name_ar: مقعد سيارة ماكسي كوزي بيبل 360
ingredients: EPS foam, polyester fabric, steel reinforcement, ISOFIX base compatible
safety_notes: i-Size (R129) certified. Rotates 360° for easy access. Side impact protection. Must be installed rear-facing until 15 months.

name: Gerber Organic Stage 2 Pear & Mango Puree
name_ar: هريس جربر العضوي المرحلة الثانية بالكمثرى والمانجو
ingredients: organic pear, organic mango, vitamin C
safety_notes: No added sugar, salt, or preservatives. Introduce one new food at a time to monitor for allergies.

name: Philips Avent Natural Bottle 260ml (Pack of 2)
name_ar: زجاجة فيليبس أفنت ناتشورال 260 مل (عبوة من 2)
ingredients: BPA-free polypropylene, silicone teat (medium flow)
safety_notes: BPA, BPS, and phthalate-free. Sterilize before first use. Replace teats every 3 months.

name: Mustela Hydra Bebe Body Lotion 300ml
name_ar: لوشن موستيلا هيدرا بيبي للجسم 300 مل
ingredients: avocado perseose, sunflower oil, glycerin, vitamin E
safety_notes: Hypoallergenic, paraben-free. Suitable for newborn skin including premature babies.

name: Fisher-Price Sit-Me-Up Floor Seat
name_ar: مقعد فيشر برايس للجلوس على الأرض
age_range: 6+ months (when baby can hold head up)
ingredients: polyester fabric, foam padding, plastic frame, removable toy tray
safety_notes: Use only on floor, never on elevated surfaces. Maximum weight 11 kg. Not a substitute for adult supervision.

name: Nuk First Choice+ Pacifier 0-6m Silicone
name_ar: لهاية نوك فيرست تشويس + 0-6 شهور سيليكون
ingredients: medical-grade silicone, polypropylene shield
safety_notes: BPA-free. Inspect before each use; replace if damaged. Replace every 1-2 months for hygiene.

name: Aptamil Stage 2 Follow-On Formula 900g
name_ar: حليب أبتاميل المرحلة الثانية للمتابعة 900 جرام
ingredients: lactose, vegetable oils, skimmed milk, prebiotics (GOS/FOS), iron, DHA, vitamins
safety_notes: For use as part of mixed diet from 6 months. Not a breast milk substitute.

name: Pampers Newborn Diapers Size 1
name_ar: حفاضات بامبرز للمواليد الجدد مقاس 1
ingredients: absorbent core, umbilical cord notch, wetness indicator
safety_notes: Designed for newborns. Hypoallergenic, no fragrance.

name: Tommee Tippee Closer to Nature Bottle 260ml
name_ar: زجاجة تومي تيبي كلوزر تو ناتشر 260 مل
ingredients: BPA-free plastic, breast-like silicone teat
safety_notes: BPA-free. Sterilize before first use. Anti-colic valve.

name: Bumbo Floor Seat
name_ar: مقعد بومبو للأرض
age_range: 3-12 months (when baby can hold head up)
ingredients: soft, durable foam (BPA-free, phthalate-free)
safety_notes: WARNING: Never use on elevated surfaces. Always on the floor. Adult supervision required.

name: Earth's Best Organic Whole Grain Oatmeal Cereal
name_ar: حبوب الشوفان الكاملة العضوية إيرث بيست
ingredients: organic whole grain oat flour, iron, B vitamins
safety_notes: Mix with breast milk, formula, or water. Always test temperature before feeding.

name: Sebamed Baby Wash Extra Soft 200ml
name_ar: غسول سيباميد بيبي إكسترا سوفت 200 مل
ingredients: mild surfactants, allantoin, panthenol, pH 5.5
safety_notes: pH-balanced for delicate baby skin. Tear-free, soap-free.

name: Graco Modes Pramette Stroller
name_ar: عربة جراكو موديز بريميت
ingredients: aluminum frame, polyester fabric, EVA foam wheels
safety_notes: Conforms to EN 1888 safety standard. Always use harness. Apply brakes when stationary.

name: Johnson's Baby Shampoo 500ml
name_ar: شامبو جونسون بيبي 500 مل
ingredients: water, cocamidopropyl betaine, glycerin, mild fragrance
safety_notes: No More Tears formula. Discontinue use if irritation occurs.

name: Babyzen YOYO2 Stroller
name_ar: عربة بيبي زن يويو 2
ingredients: aluminum frame, foam-filled wheels, water-resistant fabric
safety_notes: Compact fold for cabin luggage. 0+ option requires newborn pack (sold separately).

name: Hipp Organic Combiotik Stage 1 600g
name_ar: حليب هيب العضوي كومبيوتيك المرحلة الأولى 600 جرام
ingredients: organic skimmed milk, organic vegetable oils, lactose, DHA, prebiotics, probiotics (L. fermentum)
safety_notes: EU organic certified. Halal certified. Always sterilize bottles.

name: Medela Swing Maxi Double Electric Breast Pump
name_ar: مضخة الثدي الكهربائية المزدوجة ميديلا سوينغ ماكسي
ingredients: BPA-free plastic, silicone, electronic motor
safety_notes: BPA-free. Clean and sterilize all parts that contact milk before each use.

name: Huggies Little Swimmers Swim Diapers Size 4
name_ar: حفاضات السباحة هاجيز ليتل سويمرز مقاس 4
ingredients: absorbent material designed not to swell in water
safety_notes: For pool/beach use only. Not absorbent like regular diapers - change immediately when soiled.

name: Vtech Baby Sit-to-Stand Walker
name_ar: مشاية فيتيك بيبي سيت تو ستاند
ingredients: durable plastic, electronic components, batteries (included)
safety_notes: Use only on flat surfaces. Not for use on stairs. Adult supervision required.

name: Munchkin Miracle 360 Trainer Cup 207ml
name_ar: كوب التدريب مونشكين ميراكل 360 207 مل
ingredients: BPA-free plastic, silicone valve
safety_notes: BPA-free. Spill-proof when valve is closed. Inspect for damage before each use.

name: Sudocrem Antiseptic Healing Cream 250g
name_ar: كريم سودوكريم المطهر للشفاء 250 جرام
ingredients: zinc oxide, lanolin, benzyl alcohol, benzyl benzoate
safety_notes: For diaper rash and minor skin irritation. Avoid eye contact. Patch test for sensitivity.

name: Skip Hop Explore & More Activity Gym
name_ar: صالة ألعاب سكيب هوب إكسبلور آند مور
ingredients: polyester fabric, foam padding, plastic toy attachments
safety_notes: Machine washable mat. Remove toys before naps. Adult supervision required.

name: NUK Perfect Fit Teether Ring
name_ar: حلقة التسنين نوك بيرفكت فيت
ingredients: BPA-free plastic, water-filled (refrigerator-safe)
safety_notes: Do not freeze. Inspect for damage before each use. Replace if cracked.

name: Aveeno Baby Daily Moisture Lotion 227ml
name_ar: لوشن أفينو بيبي للترطيب اليومي 227 مل
ingredients: colloidal oatmeal, glycerin, dimethicone
safety_notes: Contains oats - avoid if known oat allergy. Hypoallergenic, fragrance-free.

name: Britax Römer Advansafix IV R Car Seat
name_ar: مقعد سيارة بريتاكس روميل أدفانسافيكس
ingredients: EPS foam, polyester fabric, steel frame, ISOFIX
safety_notes: ECE R44/04 certified. Use rear-facing until 15 months minimum.

name: Lansinoh HPA Lanolin Nipple Cream 40g
name_ar: كريم حلمة لانسينو HPA لانولين 40 جرام
ingredients: 100% pure lanolin
safety_notes: Safe for baby - no need to wipe before nursing. Avoid if allergic to wool/lanolin.

name: Friso Gold Stage 1 Infant Formula 900g
name_ar: حليب فريسو جولد المرحلة الأولى 900 جرام
ingredients: lactose, skimmed milk, vegetable oils, prebiotics, DHA, ARA, nucleotides
safety_notes: Halal certified. Single-step processing for easier digestion.

name: Mam Anti-Colic Bottle 260ml (Pack of 2)
name_ar: زجاجة مام المضادة للمغص 260 مل (عبوة من 2)
ingredients: BPA-free plastic, silicone teat, vented base
safety_notes: Self-sterilizing in microwave (3 minutes). Anti-colic vented base.

name: Carter's Cotton Sleep Sack 0-6m TOG 1.0
name_ar: كيس نوم كارترز قطن 0-6 شهور
ingredients: 100% cotton outer, polyester fill
safety_notes: Safer alternative to loose blankets. Do not use if baby can roll out. Follow TOG rating for room temperature.

name: Boon Patch Microfiber Drying Mat
name_ar: حصيرة تجفيف بون باتش من الميكروفايبر
ingredients: microfiber, foam base
safety_notes: Hand wash only. Not dishwasher safe.

name: Ergobaby Omni 360 Baby Carrier
name_ar: حامل الأطفال إرجوبيبي أومني 360
ingredients: polyester mesh, padded shoulder straps, lumbar support
safety_notes: All four carry positions. Newborns require infant insert (built-in). Always check baby's airway.

name: WaterWipes Original Baby Wipes (60 count)
name_ar: مناديل ووتر وايبس الأصلية (60 منديل)
ingredients: 99.9% water, 0.1% grapefruit seed extract
safety_notes: Suitable for premature and newborn skin. No alcohol, fragrance, or parabens.

name: Fisher-Price Rock 'n Play Bassinet
name_ar: مهد فيشر برايس روك آند بلاي
ingredients: steel frame, polyester fabric, foam mattress
safety_notes: WARNING: For sleep, place baby on firm flat surface. Discontinue when baby starts to roll.

name: Pediasure Complete Vanilla 400g
name_ar: بيدياشور كومبليت بنكهة الفانيليا 400 جرام
ingredients: milk protein, vegetable oils, sugar, vitamins, minerals, DHA
safety_notes: Nutritional supplement, not for infants under 1 year. Consult pediatrician for picky eaters.

name: Dr. Brown's Options+ Bottle 240ml
name_ar: زجاجة دكتور براونز أوبشنز + 240 مل
ingredients: BPA-free plastic, silicone teat, internal vent system
safety_notes: Internal vent reduces colic, gas, and reflux. BPA-free.

name: BabyBjörn Bouncer Bliss
name_ar: بيبي بيورن باونسر بليس
ingredients: metal frame, cotton fabric, no batteries needed
safety_notes: Max weight 13 kg. Use only on the floor. Hand-rocking by parent recommended for newborns.

name: Nestle Cerelac Wheat with Milk Stage 1
name_ar: نستله سيرلاك قمح مع الحليب المرحلة الأولى
ingredients: wheat flour, milk, sugar, iron, vitamins (A, C, D, B-complex)
safety_notes: Iron-fortified. Always test temperature. Do not reheat leftovers.

name: Snuggletime Mosquito Net for Cot
name_ar: ناموسية سناجلتايم لسرير الأطفال
ingredients: polyester mesh, elastic edges
safety_notes: Ensure proper fit - no gaps. Inspect regularly for tears.

name: Heinz Apple & Banana Puree Pouch 100g
name_ar: هريس هاينز التفاح والموز 100 جرام
ingredients: apple puree, banana puree, vitamin C
safety_notes: No added sugar or salt. Squeeze pouch directly or onto spoon.

name: Mothercare 3-in-1 Travel System
name_ar: نظام السفر 3 في 1 من ماذركير
ingredients: aluminum frame, polyester fabric, foam-filled wheels
safety_notes: Includes stroller, car seat, and carrycot. Conforms to EN 1888.

name: Bepanthen Nappy Care Ointment 100g
name_ar: مرهم بيبانثين للعناية بحفاضات الأطفال 100 جرام
ingredients: dexpanthenol 5%, lanolin, almond oil, beeswax
safety_notes: For prevention and treatment of diaper rash. Avoid if known nut allergy.

name: Kiinde Twist Breast Milk Storage Bags (40-pack)
name_ar: أكياس تخزين حليب الأم كيندي تويست (40 كيس)
ingredients: BPA-free, phthalate-free polyethylene
safety_notes: Pre-sterilized. Single use only. Store milk per CDC/WHO guidelines (4 hours room temp, 4 days fridge, 6 months freezer).

name: Lamaze Freddie the Firefly Plush Toy
name_ar: لعبة فريدي اليراعة من لاميز
ingredients: polyester plush, crinkle paper, plastic teether
safety_notes: Hand wash only. Inspect for loose parts before each use.

name: Clevamama ClevaFoam Baby Pillow
name_ar: وسادة الأطفال كليفاماما كليفافوم
ingredients: ClevaFoam (CMHR foam), 100% cotton cover
safety_notes: WARNING: Pediatric guidance recommends NO pillow under 12 months for sleep. This product is for awake/supervised use.

name: Similac Total Comfort Stage 1 820g
name_ar: سيميلاك توتال كومفورت المرحلة الأولى 820 جرام
ingredients: partially hydrolyzed whey protein, vegetable oils, low lactose, prebiotics
safety_notes: For babies with feeding difficulties (fussiness, gas). Consult pediatrician. Halal certified.

name: Tiny Love Magical Tales Black & White Mobile
name_ar: موبايل تايني لوف ماجيكال تيلز أبيض وأسود
ingredients: plastic frame, fabric toys, music box (battery-operated)
safety_notes: Remove from crib when baby can push up on hands and knees (around 5 months).
